nasb.text: Now hear this, heads of the house of Jacob And rulers of the house of Israel, Who abhor justice And twist everything that is straight,

esv.text: Hear this, you heads of the house of Jacob and rulers of the house of Israel, who detest justice and make crooked all that is straight,

cnv.text: 雅各家的首領，你們要聽這個， 以色列家的官長，你們也要聽； 你們厭惡公平， 屈枉正直，

ccb.text: 雅各家的首领，以色列家的统治者啊， 你们要听！ 你们厌恶正义，颠倒是非；
